text: Appa ki khamoshi dekh kar main bas roni ja rahi hoon, unhone result card dekha aur ek lafz nahi kaha. Cutoff clear nahi hua aur NRI aspirations tootne ke baad ab 'log kya kahenge' aur shaadi ka darr mujhe dimaag se sunn kar raha hai. Abhi mujhse dropper banne ya back paper ki baat mat karo, bas ye ghabrahat aur rona ruk nahi raha.

Amma ne jab bina kuch bole result card side mein rakha, toh Iyer uncle ki beti ki rank aur meri failure ne mujhe andar se khokhla kar diya hai. Restricted mobility ke kaaran main bahar hawa khane bhi nahi ja sakti, bas hostel ke bed par dher hokar rone ja rahi hoon. 'Mera kuch nahi hoga' wali soch itni haavi hai ki next exam ka dhyan hi nahi aa raha, bas dimaag blank hai.

Result dekhne ke baad ghar mein jo sannata chha gaya, usne mujhe completely paralyse kar diya hai aur main bas khadi kaanp rahi hoon. Sharma ji ke bete ki cutoff clear ho gayi par main dropper banke bhi fail ho gayi, is sharam se meri saans atak rahi hai. Abhi mujhe Bangalore aakar aage padhne ya safety ki baat mat samjhao, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekh nikal rahi hai.

Appa ne result dekh kar bas ek thandi aah bhari, aur us khamoshi ne mujhe completely break kar diya hai. Main pehle hi marriage pressure aur is strict hostel curfew mein pis rahi thi, ab engineering ki cutoff clear na hone par andar se poori tarah toot chuki hoon. Mera dimaag itna sunn ho chuka hai ki agle paper ki tayari toh door, bas aankhon se aansu ruk nahi rahe.

Result card dikhane ke baad mummy-papa ki wo silence itni bhari thi ki main wahi zameen par baith kar bilakh-bilakh kar rone lagi. Mera NRI cousin pehle hi taane marta tha, aur ab back paper aane ki wajah se ghar wale turant meri padhai chhudwa kar shaadi karwa denge. Abhi mujhe koi career ya safe city shift hone ki advice mat do, mera poora wajood hi khatam lag raha hai aur main bas rona chahti hoon.
